name: 仙境漫游
ability: 有[Wandering]的角色会在仙境中“漫游”。这些角色会将他们的“漫游”标记置于魔典中。

name: 闲情漫步
ability: 在游戏开始时，说书人要决定每个“漫游”标记的移动方向（顺/逆时针，每名角色一个)。善良角色的“漫游”标记初始不会在对应角色上，而邪恶角色的“漫游”标记初始在自己身上。每个夜晚*，“漫游”标记会沿设置好的方向移动1格（除非另有说明)。镇民角色和邪恶角色的“漫游”标记会在移动时跳过死亡玩家与邪恶玩家。外来者角色和旅行者的“漫游”标记在移动时只会跳过死亡玩家。
flavor: Would you tell me please which way I ought to walk from here?” said Alice “That depends a good deal on where you want to go,” said the Cat.
firstNightReminder: 在游戏开始时，说书人要决定每个“漫游”标记的移动方向（顺/逆时针，每名角色一个)。善良角色的“漫游”标记初始不会在对应角色上，而邪恶角色的“漫游”标记初始在自己身上。每个夜晚*，“漫游”标记会沿设置好的方向移动1格（除非另有说明)。镇民角色和邪恶角色的“漫游”标记会在移动时跳过死亡玩家与邪恶玩家。外来者角色和旅行者的“漫游”标记在移动时只会跳过死亡玩家。

name: 特维尔德兄弟
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知另一个特维尔德兄弟是谁。当他死亡时，你会一同死亡。[+1 特维尔德兄弟]
flavor: Tweedledum and Tweedledee Agreed to have a battle; For Tweedledum said Tweedledee Had spoiled his nice new rattle.

firstNightReminder: Learns the roll of the player their *WANDERING* token is on. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: Learns the roll of the player their *WANDERING* token is on. :reminder:
name: 柴郡猫
ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知你的“漫游”标记所在玩家的角色。 [Wandering]
flavor: but a grin without a cat! It’s the most curious thing I ever saw in all my life!

otherNightReminder: If the Dormouse did not nominate or vote today they choose a player they are drunk. :reminder:
name: 睡鼠
ability: 每个夜晚*，如果你在今天白天没有发起提名和投票，你可以选择一名玩家：他醉酒直到下个黄昏。
flavor: You might just as well say, ” added the Dormouse, who seemed to be talking in his sleep, “that ‘I breathe when I sleep’ is the same thing as ‘I sleep when I breathe’!

name: 鹰头狮
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名除你以外的玩家(与上次选择不同)：他免疫爪牙与恶魔的能力直到下个黄昏。
flavor: That’s the reason they’re called lessons,” the Gryphon remarked: “because they lessen from day to day.

otherNightReminder: The Mad Hatter chooses a player. :reminder:
name: 疯帽子
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名存活玩家: 你会获得他的能力直到下个黄昏，但你们之中会有一人醉酒直到下个黄昏。
flavor: One to be a murderer. One to be a Martyr. One to be a Monarch. One to go Mad

name: 白玫瑰
ability: 每个夜晚*, 你会得知你身上是否有“漫游”标记。
otherNightReminder: Is there a wandering token on them?
flavor: Why the fact is, you see, Miss, this here ought to have been a red rose-tree, and we put a white one in by mistake

otherNightReminder: Ask if they want to use their ability, if the ability is used place the *NO ABILIY* reminder next to them, skip the rest of the night phase. :reminder:
name: 白兔先生
ability: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时，你可以选择跳过当晚剩余的夜晚行动。（当晚之后的行动不会被唤醒/进行，直接进入白天）
flavor: I'm late, I'm late, for a very important date! No time to say “Hello, Good Bye” I'm late, I'm late, I'm late!

name: 白皇后
ability: 在你的首个白天，你可以公开猜测至多六名角色。在当晚，你会知道其中有多少名角色不在场。
flavor: Why, sometimes I’ve believed as many as six impossible things before breakfast.

name: 渡渡鸟
ability: 每局游戏限一次，在白天时你可以拜访说书人以得知一名与你邻近的存活玩家的角色。
flavor: What I was going to say,” said the Dodo in an offended tone, “was, that the best thing to get us dry would be a Caucus-race.

name: 爱丽丝
ability: 每局游戏限一次，你可以在白天公开猜测所有存活玩家的角色：如果猜测正确，你的阵营获胜。如果只有三名存活玩家，你失去此能力。
flavor: I—I hardly know, Sir, just at present—at least I know who I was when I got up this morning, but I think I must have been changed several times since then.

name: 拜亚德
ability: 每个白天，你可以拜访说书人并选择一名存活玩家：你会得知他身上的“漫游”标记数量。
flavor: Bayard: [sits] Would your name be...Alice? By any chance?

otherNightReminder: If nominated learns the character of the player with the *NOMINATOR* token next to them. :reminder:
name: 蛙仆
ability: 在你首次被提名后，你会在当晚得知提名你的玩家的角色。
flavor: [sings] “From the Queen an invitation for the Duchess to play croquette.

name: 红心国王
ability: 你的“漫游”标记所在的玩家不会死于处决，即使你已死亡。如果只有三名存活玩家，你失去此能力。 [Wandering]
flavor: I don’t like the look of it at all,” said the King: “however, it may kiss my hand, if it likes.

firstNightReminder: Learns a roll of the player their *WANDERING* token is on. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: Learns a roll of the player their *WANDERING* token is on. :reminder:
name: 假海龟
ability: 你以为你是柴郡猫，但你可能获取错误信息。 [Wandering]
flavor: We called him Tortoise because he taught us,” said the Mock Turtle angrily: “really you are very dull!

firstNightReminder: Place the *DRUNK* token on a living neighbour. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: Place the *DRUNK* token on a living neighbour different from the previous night. :reminder:
name: 毛毛虫
ability: 每个夜晚, 与你邻近的存活玩家之一醉酒 (与上个夜晚不同)。
flavor: You'll get used to it in time” said the Caterpillar; and it put the hookah into its mouth and began smoking again.

name: 三月兔
ability: 如果你死于处决，当晚恶魔可以选择一名玩家：他死亡。
flavor: Have some wine,” the March Hare said in an encouraging tone. Alice looked all round the table, but there was nothing on it but tea.

name: 公爵夫人
ability: 每个夜晚*，你会得知你的“漫游”标记所在玩家的阵营，然后你会转变为他的阵营。[Wandering]
flavor: Be what you would seem to be, or, if you'd like it put more simply never imagine yourself not to be otherwise

name: 厨娘
ability: 每个夜晚*，你的“漫游”标记所在的玩家会中毒直到下个黄昏，即使他已死亡。 [Wandering]
flavor: Who Stole the Tarts?

firstNightReminder: Learns the roll where their *KNOWN* token is. :reminder:
name: 班德斯尼奇
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一名在场角色。每局游戏限一次，你可以在白天公开猜测谁是那名角色：如果猜测正确，那么他和他邻近的一名存活玩家会一同死亡。
flavor: Part of the Queen of Hearts hunting party and will kill others who stand between them and their prey.

otherNightReminder: If they voted today, wake them to select a player and place the *DOES NOT WAKE* reminder next to them. :reminder:
name: 朱布朱布鸟
ability: 每个夜晚*，如果你今天白天投票过，你可以选择一名玩家：他今晚不会被唤醒。[+1外来者]
flavor: OFF WITH THEIR HEADS!!! RELEASE THE JUBJUB BIRD! You're right, Stayne, it is far better to be feared than loved.

name: 扑克卫兵
ability: 每局游戏限一次，被处决的邪恶玩家可能不会死亡。 [-1外来者]
flavor: Guarding the Queens of Hearts court they put themselves on the line to protect the Queen.

otherNightReminder: Time chooses a player to die. :reminder: :reminder:
name: 侩子手
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。每当一名死亡玩家被选择时，你的“漫游”标记会移动一次。当“漫游”标记重新回到你身上时，你的阵营获胜。 [Wandering]
flavor: I think you might do something better with the time

otherNightReminder: The Queen of Hearts chooses a player to die. :reminder: :reminder: :reminder:
name: 红皇后
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。如果你今天白天被提名，今晚你可以行动两次。
flavor: Off with their heads!

otherNightReminder: The Knave of Hearts chooses a player to die.:reminder: :reminder: :reminder:
name: 红心骑士
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。如果有外来者在今天白天被处决，今晚你可以行动两次。 [+1外来者]
flavor: We're looking for the girl called Alice...If you're hiding her you'll lose your heads.

otherNightReminder: The Jabberwocky chooses a player to die. :reminder: :reminder: :reminder:
name: 贾巴沃克
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选中一名玩家：他死亡。第一个提名你的善良玩家随时可能死亡
flavor: Beware the Jabberwock, my son! The jaws that bite, the claws that catch! Twas brillig, and the slithy toves Did gyre and gimble in the wabe.

name: 木匠
ability: 当你被流放时，如果你的“漫游”标记所在玩家阵营与你不同，他死亡。[Wandering].
flavor: When I use a word,” Humpty Dumpty said in rather a scornful tone, “it means what I choose it to mean – neither more nor less.

name: 海象
ability: 在提名开始前，你可以公开选择一名玩家：他只能在你投票时投票。
flavor: The time has come,” the Walrus said, “To talk of many things: Of shoes—and ships—and sealing-wax— Of cabbages—and kings— And why the sea is boiling hot— And whether pigs have wings.
